start.txt: No time to explain, we need to get out of here!

scene2.txt: You and the fox run out of the cave and into the forest, the rumbling getting louder behind you.

keepRunning.txt: We need to find somewhere to hide!

findHidingSpot.txt: I see a cave over there!

safe.txt: You and the fox take cover in the cave as the rumbling fades away.
